full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28052

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28052.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
sequoia-sq-1.3.1.1-1.0.2.el10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
sequoia-sq-1.3.1.1-1.0.2.el10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/rust-sequoia-sq-1.3.1.1-1.0.2.el10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.3.1.1-1.0.2]
- Put "Requires" openssl-libs in correct placeholder [Orabug: 38742109]

[1.3.1.1-1.0.1]
- Hard require needed openssl-libs [Orabug: 38742109]
